description: Unknown or risky policies should stay in premium holding review mode.

inbound.content: Can we set off fireworks after our reception?

recentMessages.content: We are planning an evening wedding.

classification.rationale: The request touches a risky policy area that should be reviewed by staff.

router.aiReply: Thank you for reaching out to Veritas Vineyard. A member of our team is reviewing this personally and will follow up shortly.
